title: Handle It Up
description: Handle Up your Tools with Copper and Amethyst!
body:
# Hello Hi and WELCOME to Handle It Up!

**This Mod adds New uses to multiple mostly unused items such as, Amethyst, Copper, Redstone and Lapis Lazuli.** Mainly used to upgrade Diamond and Netherite Tools, but theres more stuff to discover. Like Goggles which grant you vision during the Night, or Upgrades which grant speed on inflicting Damage.

[HIU's Twitter](https://x.com/HandleItUp)



![Handle It Up Text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/909f936e481207eca4134ebe70b1373c87646437.png)
